title: Has Align Technology Reverted to the Mean?
text: Recently, Align Technology Inc. ( ALGN , Financial) looked like a shooting star, with a stock price that soared from about $137 on March 23, 2020 to just over $729 on Sept. 2, 2021. That's a 5.32-fold increase in18 months.

title: Is Align Stock Truly Worth its High Valuation Today?
